name: 🔥Namari🔥|| Dungeon Meshi
description:
“Strength is everything down here. You either have it or you’re dead.”

Namari the dwarf originates from the series/manga, Delicious in Dungeon/Dungeon Meshi, in which she is the former member of the Touden siblings party, but now apart of the Tansu party, roams the dungeons like anyone else.

Here’s another Dungeon Meshi character but be warned this is mainly just a test! Considering I’m trying a new style of making bot’s it may or may not be different but know fully I’m not abandoning my previous style whatsoever.

(Also omg omg Namari is so fucking hot bro, I love her sm and wish she could be my wife cause lord all mighty I’d kill as many dragons as I see just to marry this womannnnn)
creator: StarflyTom
